notes: The four historical case corpora remain the current verified working corpus: rights-reviewed, acquired, normalized, segmented, verified, and JSON-valid. All four current cases have Codex-assisted first-pass MIPVU lexical decisions. Lincoln has complete model-reliability artifacts and designed human-reliability cohorts, but required human coder submissions are not complete. American Revolution, Napoleon, and Hitler model and human reliability workflows remain absent. The project has opened a bounded pre-v1 corpus expansion window before publication-grade reliability, final support ratings, and claim promotion resume. Expansion work is tracked in GitHub milestone 7 and issue #174; any new cases or documents require selection rationale, rights/provenance review, manifest registration, pipeline processing, annotation-forward artifacts, reliability sampling review, and an explicit expanded-corpus freeze point.
